overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Far Cry 6) showing a player character walking through a tropical residential area with distinctive pink buildings and palm trees. The player ascends concrete stairs, passes construction workers, navigates narrow alleys with scaffolding, and approaches a military checkpoint.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a pink residential building

tall palm tree next to the building
straw-thatched umbrella structure near the building entrance
construction excavator parked beside the building
overgrown grassy area with wild vegetation

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dirt path through a tropical area with lush grass and palm trees. A pink residential building with construction equipment sits ahead under a clear blue sky.

events.description: ascends concrete stairs from dirt path to paved terrace level
encounters construction workers on the upper platform

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs to reach the upper terrace area

notable_agents.action: worker in red overalls sweeping debris near a black trash bag

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with pink painted sidewalls
metal pipe scaffolding along the building facade
pink painted metal railing along the stairs and terrace

segments.scene_description: The player ascends concrete stairs to a paved terrace where construction workers are present. Metal scaffolding covers the building facade as the player moves from the open dirt path into the built environment.

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved path beside the scaffolded building

notable_agents.action: armed soldier walking ahead in the alleyway

entered.detail: large yellow industrial dumpster on the walkway
green electrical utility box on the pavement
metal bar gate blocking part of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along a narrow paved alley lined with scaffolding. A yellow dumpster and utility boxes occupy the path while an armed NPC walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with drainage channel

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow passage between a tall wall and the building

notable_agents.action: soldier patrolling the narrow corridor ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier wall with horizontal blue painted stripe
narrow water-filled drainage channel running alongside the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow corridor with a tall concrete wall on the left and a water channel on the right. The space is more confined with shadows cast by the high walls.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open parking lot area with gas station visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the covered checkpoint structure in the open area

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the checkpoint barrier

entered.detail: red and white gas station canopy visible in the distance
large covered checkpoint structure with red support pillars
tall flagpole with red and white flag
stacked sandbag fortifications near the checkpoint entrance
portable generator on a wheeled trailer

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide asphalt area with a gas station and military checkpoint ahead. The player approaches a covered pavilion structure flanked by sandbags and a flagpole, transitioning from the confined alley to an open security zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a lush tropical exterior into a confined urban corridor that eventually opens into a military security zone. It begins on a dirt path surrounded by grass and palm trees, moving toward a pink residential building under a clear blue sky. As the camera ascends concrete stairs, the open landscape shifts into a built environment of paved terraces and metal scaffolding where construction workers are present. The scene then tightens into a narrow paved alley lined with utility boxes and a yellow dumpster, transitioning further into a confined corridor flanked by a high concrete wall and a water channel. Finally, the space expands from these shadows into a wide asphalt area, moving past a gas station toward a military checkpoint marked by sandbags and a flagpole.
